name: Machine Angel Absolute Ritual
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>絶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card can be used to Ritual Summon any "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster. You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field and/or shuffle Fairy or Warrior-Type monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck, whose total Levels exactly equal the Level of the Ritual Monster you Ritual Summon.
eff: This card can be used to Ritual Summon any "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster. You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field and/or shuffle Fairy or Warrior-Type monsters from your Graveyard into the Deck, whose total Levels exactly equal the Level of the Ritual Monster you Ritual Summon.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
